name: Sacrilege Seal
description: Notes Part of the Unholy Paladin Set. Unlike tiered seals, the Sacrilege Seal only provides one of the positive status effects (it only gives temporary Damaging) to the player or nearby allies. However, it gives the user +250 HP instead.
effects: On party: Damaging Damaging Range: 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Damaging Duration: 4 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds On self: +250 max HP for 6 seconds On self: Healing [40/s] for 3.2 seconds
